name: mattpocock-skills
description: Engineering and productivity skills for real engineers — grilling sessions, TDD, architecture review, issue triage, and more. Forked from mattpocock/skills to add marketplace install support pending upstream issue #21.

plugins.name: diagnose
plugins.description: Disciplined diagnosis loop for hard bugs and performance regressions. Reproduce → minimise → hypothesise → instrument → fix → regression-test.

plugins.name: grill-with-docs
plugins.description: Grilling session that challenges your plan against the existing domain model, sharpens terminology, and updates documentation (CONTEXT.md, ADRs) inline as decisions crystallise.

plugins.name: triage
plugins.description: Triage issues through a state machine driven by triage roles. Use when you want to create an issue, review incoming bugs or feature requests, or prepare issues for an AFK agent.

plugins.name: improve-codebase-architecture
plugins.description: Find deepening opportunities in a codebase, informed by the domain language in CONTEXT.md and the decisions in docs/adr/.

plugins.name: setup-matt-pocock-skills
plugins.description: Scaffold the per-repo config (issue tracker, triage label vocabulary, domain doc layout) that the other engineering skills consume. Run once per repo before using the other engineering skills.

plugins.name: tdd
plugins.description: Test-driven development with a red-green-refactor loop. Builds features or fixes bugs one vertical slice at a time.

plugins.name: to-issues
plugins.description: Break any plan, spec, or PRD into independently-grabbable issues on the project issue tracker using tracer-bullet vertical slices.

plugins.name: to-prd
plugins.description: Turn the current conversation context into a PRD and publish it to the project issue tracker. No interview — just synthesizes what you've already discussed.

plugins.name: zoom-out
plugins.description: Tell the agent to zoom out and give broader context or a higher-level perspective on an unfamiliar section of code.

plugins.name: prototype
plugins.description: Build a throwaway prototype to flush out a design — either a runnable terminal app for state/business-logic questions, or several radically different UI variations toggleable from one route.

plugins.name: caveman
plugins.description: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts token usage ~75% by dropping filler while keeping full technical accuracy.

plugins.name: grill-me
plugins.description: Get relentlessly interviewed about a plan or design until every branch of the decision tree is resolved.

plugins.name: write-a-skill
plugins.description: Create new skills with proper structure, progressive disclosure, and bundled resources.
